title: Munduvareda Adhyaya
subTitle: ACP Bala is in charge of investigating a prominent figure's mysterious murder. However, the mystery keeps getting even more complicated with each reveal instead of taking him closer to the criminal.

title: Veer Madhakari Iss Sadi Ka
subTitle: Madakari, an honest cop, is killed by the hands of the atrocious Babji. Sathyaraju, who bears an uncanny resemblance to Madakari, takes his place to take care of his daughter amd exact revenge.

title: Rowdy Lover
subTitle: An unlikely romance blooms between a soft-hearted thug and his IT consultant neighbor, blending tough exteriors with tender hearts.

title: Bal Hanuman Return Of The Demon
subTitle: Bal Hanuman and his friends join together to defeat the crocodile demon who has been brought to life in order to create havoc on Earth.

title: Bal Hanuman 4: Attack of the Universe
subTitle: When Chote Maharaj arranges an intense kabaddi tournament between monkeys and crocodiles, the treacherous reptiles conspire to resurrect their demon king using support from extraterrestrial allies.

title: Deewar Man of Power
subTitle: Childhood friends Bujji and Chitti decide to meet after 12 years. Bujji, a gangster, attempts to murder Sivanna, not knowing that he is Chitti's brother.

title: Bogan
subTitle: A police officer probes a seasoned robber, oblivious to his hidden power, which allows him to possess people through eye contact.

title: RDX
subTitle: Robert, Dony and Xavier grow up together while honing their fighting skills. However, after an incident separates them for several years, an attack on their family reunites the three friends.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Yellapragada Jai, an honest man, faces challenges when his childhood friend, Keshava, becomes a criminal. To protect his country, Jai puts everything on the line to thwart Keshava's perilous plans.

title: Gajaana
subTitle: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

title: Gally Rowdy
subTitle: A young man tries to find a balance between his love interest and friends. Meanwhile, his friends convince him to stay rowdy.

title: Khakee
subTitle: A deputy commissioner and his crew attempt to transport a terrorist to Mumbai, but their mission is thwarted by an ex-policeman with an agenda of his own.

title: Khakee
subTitle: A deputy commissioner and his crew attempt to transport a terrorist to Mumbai, but their mission is thwarted by an ex-policeman with an agenda of his own.

title: Ek Janbaaz Police Officer
subTitle: Bharat, an honest cop gets transferred to Durgapur which is ruled by Simhadri, a criminal. He decides to teach him a lesson.

title: Nafrat Ki Jung
subTitle: Nafrat Ki Jung

title: Spy
subTitle: An agent investigates the death of his elder brother with the help of his fellow agents. However, his actions lead to the discovery of a nuclear plot against India.

title: Ek Aur Mrityu Pujan
subTitle: When the shadow of evil starts taking over the world, a warrior fights for good, as an avatar of Narasimha, a lion god, who is known for destroying evil.

title: Pichaikkaran 2
subTitle: Sathya is a poor man in search of his sister, who has been kidnapped by human traffickers. However, an illegal brain transplant puts him in the shoes of a billionaire named Vijay.

title: Zombie Reddy
subTitle: Chaos ensue as Mario, a game developer, and his gang of friends get entangled in a family feud and an enigmatic zombie attack in Rayalaseema, while attending a friend's wedding.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: Vishal in Laatti Charge
subTitle: Muruganantham, a dedicated police constable, is trapped in a high-rise with his son, forced to fight ruthless enemies while protecting the boy and finding a way to escape.

title: Vishal in Laatti Charge
subTitle: Muruganantham, a dedicated police constable, is trapped in a high-rise with his son, forced to fight ruthless enemies while protecting the boy and finding a way to escape.

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Ek Tha Nayak
subTitle: When a respected police officer is killed by a gangster, his younger brother decides to avenge him by hunting the man down.

title: The Masterpiece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Agent Chanakya
subTitle: Arjun, a highly sought-after RAW agent, is known for his skills at catching some of the most hardened criminals. However, he falls in danger when he goes after Ibrahim Qureshi, a terrorist.

title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla
subTitle: A young man follows in his father's footsteps by working for the welfare of the people living in his district. However, a corrupt politician threatens to thwart his plans.

title: Mission 118
subTitle: An investigative journalist has nightmares about a young woman's murder and tries to uncover whether his dreams have any connection to reality.

title: Godfather
subTitle: The chief minister's passing wreaks havoc across the state and in his political party. However, a mysterious contender for the post rises to eradicate wrongdoers.

title: Tantra
subTitle: Rekha, a woman with the ability to perceive spirits, sees her life take a dark turn when she encounters a sinister black magic practitioner.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
subTitle: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.
